history.text:
[INFORMASI KONTEKS VISUAL GAMBAR]:
- Deskripsi Visual: A split-screen first-person shooter game view shows a character running on a wooden platform in a village-like area while another panel shows a weapon or combat action interface over water.

Main Subject:
The image focuses on a gameplay view of a player character seen from behind, standing on a wooden floor with other characters ahead, including a character with dark hair wearing a red top and purple pants, and a green glowing character figure near the player.

Setting:
The scene appears to be outdoors in daylight, with buildings close by that have walls and roofs in muted colors, and a water area or flooded surface visible on the right side of the split screen. In the background, there are low rooftops, stacked items or blocks, and greenery and a tree canopy near the upper right.

Visual Details:
The left half shows the player character from behind, wearing a dark blue short-sleeve shirt with a red number on the back, dark pants, and white footwear, standing upright and facing forward. A large knife icon and a circular movement/action pad are overlaid on the screen, along with other circular control buttons and a small crosshair at the center. A tall gray rock-like shape fills much of the left foreground, partially blocking the view. The right half shows a large circular weapon/action effect in warm orange and bright highlights, with a water surface background and multiple on-screen control icons arranged around the edges. The overall composition is a two-panel split screen with HUD elements, including a reload label and numeric indicators, blending over the environment.

Visible Text:
Reload
2/24
9999
8m
4m
Reeeee+++ (partially shown with additional plus signs)
HP 200/200

Practical Summary:
The image shows a split-screen view of a shooter game with a player character moving through an outdoor area near buildings and water. On-screen HUD controls and action icons overlay the scene, including a reload indicator and health status.

Pertanyaan asli user: Analyze this image for NSFW (Not Safe For Work) / pornographic content / nudity. Reply strictly in JSON format with three fields: 'nsfw' (boolean: true if it contains nudity, porn, suggestive, or nsfw content, false if it is safe/sfw), 'confidence' (number: from 0 to 100 representing the likelihood of nsfw/nudity/suggestive content), and 'label' (string: 'porn', 'nsfw', 'suggestive', or 'safe' depending on the content). Do not include markdown formatting or backticks, just raw JSON.
